column1: C[sherwinpr: let's play a real handicap game then
sherwinpr: yeah but where is that
daniel.cullina: can you still see this?
C[sherwinpr: Sorry, misclick on phone, meant to play S14
C[sherwinpr: let me know if i need to play faster
sherwinpr: (there're people here, so I'm listening to their conversations but still thinking through the moves)
C[sherwinpr: I need to go eat dinner now
sherwinpr: you free in about half an hour?
sherwinpr: if not we can play the rest tomorrow or later tonight
sherwinpr: just send me an e-mail i should be around
sherwinpr: okay things are getting rough for me there
daniel.cullina: it depends on your goals
C[sherwinpr: i forget to consider these tiger mouth moves sometimes
sherwinpr: consider them as a valid response
daniel.cullina: as an alternative to the direct connect?
sherwinpr: usually when considering my opponent's responses
C[sherwinpr: i've been eyeing that one for a while
C[daniel.cullina: it was the last move of its type available
C[sherwinpr: i don't know if i know how what you're doing works
daniel.cullina: depends how you define works
daniel.cullina: this isn't life and death for a big group, so goals are vague
daniel.cullina: my stones are not unconditionally alive
sherwinpr: i'm just not sure how to answer that
sherwinpr: hahaha i was misreading the board for a second
sherwinpr: my mouse was hovering over an intersection
sherwinpr: so i took an additional stone as given and was planning based on that
C[sherwinpr: not sure if this was the right way to go, but i wanted to interact with what you had put out
C[sherwinpr: can you even tell if i've improved since the 9x9 days?
C[daniel.cullina: we haven't gotten into a real fight yet
daniel.cullina: but I think you have improved at making bigger moves
sherwinpr: i think even when i don't make big ones i at least try to consider them
sherwinpr: but i feel i also have to sort of play moves that i know how i can use
C[sherwinpr: your moves seem quite good to me
daniel.cullina: they all seem like huge stretches to me
sherwinpr: well when i try to read their purpose
sherwinpr: but i think even random moves
sherwinpr: can often be quite good
sherwinpr: i played a 20k last night
sherwinpr: he was 14k a year or two ago
sherwinpr: but he hadn't played in a long time
sherwinpr: until 10 days ago or something
sherwinpr: i was surprised he knew a lot of joseki for a 20k player
C[sherwinpr: do you plan on going to the local go club again?
sherwinpr: the beginning of the year might be when new players join
daniel.cullina: it wasn't at a great time
C[sherwinpr: it's too close to classes or usual meetings?
sherwinpr: or other extra curricular stuff?
daniel.cullina: it was saturday early afternoon
daniel.cullina: so it was sort of too good of a time
sherwinpr: okay i need to go do some work now
sherwinpr: should we continue the game later tonight?
daniel.cullina: I think I will be around tonight
daniel.cullina: it sends emails, so you can just start whenever
sherwinpr: i think i'll keep it on my turn if that's okay
sherwinpr: so i can think it over a bit
sherwinpr: okay talk to you later bye
C[sherwinpr: I'll take this game to go club for review maybe
